# app-05891-row-inventory-shipment — scripts

Create inactive entrys in calendar. Use when tracking premium trace changes, tracking open label changes, unmuteing reports by team, canceling subtasks by archive. Returns matching ids with metadata. Supports filtering by unverified item fields.
